name: agentlens
description: Community Edition. Always-on local dashboard for your Claude Code, Cowork & Cursor work: live sessions, sub-agents, tokens, 4-way data provenance and an ULTRACODE strategy view, plus a self-enriching AI feed. Fully local: no hooks, no bundled MCP servers, no telemetry. Advanced token-optimization & the nightly self-improvement engine are available in AgentLens Pro.
